name: Onyx Pentacle
text: [action]: Evade. Either use your [willpower] or get +1 [agility] for this evasion attempt. When you initiate this ability, choose one - - Exhaust Onyx Pentacle and place 1 doom on it to target any enemy at your location or a connecting location, and get +1 skill value for this evasion attempt. - If you succeed by 2 or more, remove 1 doom from Onyx Pentacle.

name: Path of Thorns
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Path of Thorns: Take 1 damage. Forced - After you explore while at Path of Thorns, if the exploration was not successful: Take 1 damage.

name: Dimensional Shambler
text: Hunter. Forced - After Dimensional Shambler deals you damage from its attack: Reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If an [auto_fail] symbol is revealed, it snatches you from this dimension; remove Dimensional Shambler from the game and you are defeated.

name: Dr. Mala Sinha
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Dr. Mala Sinha: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Taunt
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Engage any number of enemies at your location. Draw 1 card for each enemy engaged in this way.

name: Treacherous Path
text: X is this location's level. Forced - After Treacherous Path is revealed: Spawn the set-aside Coral Star Spawn enemy at this location, exhausted. It does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

name: The Rift
text: With a sudden flash of light, a rift begins to open in the wall nearby, energy slowly coalescing into the shape of a portal. It is too small to enter now, but soon it will be large enough for a person to step through... Revelation - Attach The Rift to the current act. If it is act 1, Groups B and C put the set-aside Key of Mysteries into play at a [[Distortion]] location. Forced - At the end of the round, if there is at least 3 doom on each group's agenda: The rift opens wide enough for an investigator to step through. Choose an investigator at any location to enter the rift. Then, that investigator flips this card over and follows the instructions on its other side.

name: Famine
text: Revelation - Put Famine into play next to the agenda deck. Increase the cost of each card you play by 1. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Famine from play.

name: The Cabildo
text: [fast]: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . Then, draw the top card of the encounter deck. You may spend 2 clues to cancel this card's effects and discard it.

name: Occult Lexicon
text: Limit 1 per deck. [reaction] When you play a copy of Blood-Rite: Either change each "2" on it to a "3," or shuffle it into your deck instead of discarding it. Forced - After Occult Lexicon enters play: Search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Blood-Rite. Add 1 to your hand and shuffle the other 2 into your deck.
